name: nsfocus-nips-v5-6-r11
description: OctoBus package for NSFOCUS NIPS V5.6R11 login, blacklist, and apply-config APIs.

Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11.Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11/.name: login
Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11.Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11/.description: Login to NSFOCUS NIPS V5.6R11 and cache the session.

Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11.Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11/.name: unblock-by-ids
Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11.Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11/.description: Delete manual blacklist entries by ID.

Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11.Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11/.name: apply-config
Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11.Nsfocus_NIPS_V56R11/.description: Apply pending NSFOCUS NIPS configuration changes.
